subject: Re:
body:
This event is at the apartment of the chairman of the YIVO board. My plan had been to take the 4 or 5 shuttle and cab right here

Sent from my iPhoneg

subject: Re:
body: ill check ,, what time do you have to be in ny on the 23 rd? .
body_html: ill check ,, what time do you have to be in ny on the 23 rd? .

subject: Re:
body:
Jeffrey,

For taping in Cambridge? For breakfast and taping at my house. Depends on what woody is up for. My ideal would be a 1/2 hour-40 minute conversation, but we could do a quick taping in 15 minutes ...my team can be ready

And, just to remind,could also come to do taping in ny on 24th because I'm coming to New York the evening of 23rd for a YIVO event--to which you would both be most welcome I'm sure (YIVO is the largest collection of materials from Jewish Eastern Europe)

Lisa

Sent from my iPhone

subject: Re:
body: how much time should i allocate?

subject: Re:
body: Or we could do the taping at my house. That would be totally delightful too
body_html: Or we could do the taping at my house. That would be totally delightful too

subject: Re:
body:
Absolutely. 23rd is great. I teach my seminar that day at 1 but could tape in the morning or after class--in my office (very private), or at the Harvardx studios (less) or in the Woodberry poetry room (the nicest place).
. If Woody wanted, we could bring some students into the taping or just do the two of us...

Woody is absolutely welcome to come to the seminar, of course

John McCain, Tony Kushner, Al Gore have all signed on the last 2 days...crazy

Lisa

---

Elisa New
Powell M. Cabot Professor of American Literature
Harvard University
148 Barker Center
12 Quincy Street
Cambridge, MA
02138
███████████████
